text: Eliphaz Continues: God Blesses those Who Seek Him

segments.text: Call out if you please, but who will answer? To which of the holy ones will you turn?
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: For resentment kills a fool, and envy slays the simple.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I have seen a fool taking root, but suddenly his house was cursed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: His sons are far from safety, crushed in court without a defender.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text:
The hungry consume his harvest, taking it even from the thorns,
and the thirsty pant after his wealth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For distress does not spring from the dust, and trouble does not sprout from the ground.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Yet man is born to troubleas surely as sparks fly upward.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: However, if I were you, I would appeal to God and lay my cause before Him—
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: the One who does great and unsearchable things, wonders without number.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He gives rain to the earth and sends water upon the fields.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He sets the lowly on high, so that mourners are lifted to safety.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He thwarts the schemes of the crafty, so that their hands find no success.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He catches the wise in their craftiness, and sweeps away the plans of the cunning.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They encounter darkness by day and grope at noon as in the night.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He saves the needy from the sword in their mouth and from the clutches of the powerful.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So the poor have hope, and injustice shuts its mouth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Blessed indeed is the man whom God corrects; so do not despise the discipline of the Almighty.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz

segments.text: For He wounds, but He also binds; He strikes, but His hands also heal.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He will rescue you from six calamities; no harm will touch you in seven.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: In famine He will redeem you from death, and in battle from the stroke of the sword.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will be hidden from the scourge of the tongue, and will not fear havoc when it comes.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will laugh at destruction and famine, and need not fear the beasts of the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you will have a covenant with the stones of the field, and the wild animals will be at peace with you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will know that your tent is secure, and find nothing amiss when inspecting your home.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will know that your offspring will be many, your descendants like the grass of the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will come to the grave in full vigor, like a sheaf of grain gathered in season.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Indeed, we have investigated, and it is true! So hear it and know for yourself.
segments.speaker: Eliphaz
